message.the_protocol.profession.denied_g: You do not have the required knowledge to do that.
message.the_protocol.tacz.melee_denied: Only the SHOOTER profession knows how to perform TaCZ weapon bashes.
message.the_protocol.tacz.modify_denied: Only the SHOOTER profession can modify TaCZ weapons.
message.the_protocol.combat_roll.denied: Only the PARKOUR profession knows how to use combat rolls.
